title: US government pressures Anthropic to shut down its most powerful AI models
summary: Various sources report that the Trump administration forced Anthropic to disable its Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, sparking debate over technological sovereignty and security.

title: Microsoft: news on local AI, possible Xbox spin-off, security flaw, and CEO warning
summary: Microsoft opens Windows 11 AI to GPUs without NPU, evaluates an Xbox spin-off, faces a critical Copilot flaw, and its CEO warns about the economic concentration of AI.

title: Fox acquires Roku in a $22 billion deal
summary: Fox buys the streaming platform Roku, consolidating the streaming sector and affecting both companies' stocks.

title: UK bans social media for under-16s
summary: The British government announces a ban on TikTok and YouTube for children, joining other countries that restrict access to social media.

title: Debate on AI's impact on employment: uncertainty and bubble
summary: Experts and developers question the future of work in the face of artificial intelligence, warning of a possible bubble and lack of clarity.

title: Meta: multi-million dollar investment in AI, new AI mode on Facebook, and facial recognition prototype
summary: Meta continues its bet on artificial intelligence with a large investment, a new feature on Facebook, and a facial recognition project for glasses.

title: Stanford graduates boo Sundar Pichai over Israel contract
summary: During the graduation ceremony at Stanford, students protested against Google's CEO over his link with Israel.

title: SpaceX IPO raises $85.7 billion
summary: SpaceX becomes a public company with one of the largest Initial Public Offerings in history, revealing the Gulf's influence on AI.

title: Nintendo Switch 2: deals and resale restrictions
summary: MediaMarkt offers a historic minimum price for the Switch 2, while Nintendo imposes requirements to combat resellers.

title: Vodafone and O2: new fiber offers, Apple TV, and roaming
summary: O2 does not offer 10 Gbps fiber despite using Movistar's network, Vodafone TV could integrate Apple TV, and the operator reduces roaming prices for summer.

title: Health advances: weightlifting exercise and Alzheimer's drug
summary: Science determines the minutes of weightlifting needed to reduce mortality, and a drug that eliminates toxic Alzheimer's proteins is being developed.

title: The streaming boom: HBO Max dominates and Apple TV positions itself as the new HBO
summary: HBO Max releases the most-watched film in 51 countries while the debate grows on whether Apple TV will become the new streaming reference.

title: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes after takeoff at Edwards Base
summary: A B-52 crashes during takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base, according to official reports.

title: Over 2,000 Starbucks stores close early on June 22 due to promotion that sparked national outrage
summary: Starbucks faces backlash over a promotion, forcing thousands of stores to close early.

title: Housing affordability leads builder to offer $55,000 incentives per home
summary: Facing a stretched market, a $23 billion builder offers big incentives to attract buyers.

title: Salesforce acquires customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion
summary: Salesforce buys the AI customer service startup Fin in a billion-dollar deal.

title: World Labs: Fei-Fei Li's new AI company valued at $1 billion
summary: Renowned researcher Fei-Fei Li launches World Labs, an artificial intelligence company valued at one billion.

title: Palo Alto Networks warns of active exploitation of a vulnerability in PAN-OS GlobalProtect VPN
summary: A critical flaw is discovered in Palo Alto Networks firewalls that is being actively exploited.

title: Pokémon Go data trained an AI now linked to military drones
summary: The information collected by the game Pokémon Go was used to train artificial intelligence that was later linked to military drones.

title: Startup CEO Charlie Javice seeks Trump pardon for fraud
summary: Charlie Javice, accused of fraud, is reportedly managing a possible presidential pardon.
